content:
💡 planning-with-files | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a structured and persistent planning system for AI agents and developers using markdown files, mimicking the successful workflow of Manus.
✨ Key Features: • Claude Code skill for persistent markdown planning • Manus-style workflow pattern • Project and task management via markdown files • Session recovery and version management • Support for various IDE hooks and agent integrations
📖 Summary: This Python repository implements a Claude Code skill that enables persistent markdown planning, inspired by the Manus workflow pattern. It allows users to manage projects and tasks through structured markdown files, facilitating a more organized and efficient development process.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
